summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Public Fundraising Page and Supporter workflow. All features implemented and working correctly: Public fundraising page displays walker/challenge/pledge data, pledge form supports both 'per_km' and 'total' pledge types, supporter signup creates account with role='supporter' and pledge, existing supporters can login and make pledges, Supporter Dashboard shows all pledges with walker info and progress, navigation correctly shows Dashboard and Leaderboard for supporters only, login redirects supporters to /supporter-dashboard.
passed_tests: GET /api/fundraising/{walker_id} returns walker data, challenge info, pledges
GET /api/fundraising/invalid-id returns 404
POST /api/supporters/signup creates supporter with role='supporter' and pledge
POST /api/supporters/signup with per_km pledge type works correctly
POST /api/supporters/signup rejects duplicate email with helpful message
POST /api/pledges/{walker_id} creates pledge for authenticated supporter
POST /api/pledges/invalid-walker returns 404
GET /api/supporters/dashboard returns pledges with walker info and progress
GET /api/supporters/dashboard requires authentication (401)
GET /api/pledges/{walker_id} returns all pledges for walker
POST /api/auth/login returns correct role for supporters
Public Fundraising Page loads with walker name, stats, route map, milestones
Pledge form - Total Pledge selection with preset amounts ($25, $50, $100) works
Pledge form - Per KM selection shows estimated total calculation
Continue button shows signup form for new supporters
Signup form creates account and pledge with success toast
Login toggle switches between signup and login forms
Existing supporter login with pledge creation works
Supporter Dashboard shows accurate stats (Active Pledges, Walkers Supported, Total Pledged)
Supporter Dashboard pledge cards show walker info, progress bar, pledge amount
Supporter navigation shows only Dashboard and Leaderboard links
Walker-only nav items (Activity, Team, Supporters) are hidden for supporters
Login redirects supporters to /supporter-dashboard
seed_data_creation: Multiple test supporter accounts created during testing with TEST_ prefix
context_for_next_testing_agent: Public Fundraising Page and Supporter workflow is fully implemented and tested. Supporters can sign up or login from /fundraise/{walker_id} page, make pledges (per_km or total), and view their pledges on /supporter-dashboard. Navigation correctly adapts to supporter role showing only Dashboard and Leaderboard.
